table_id: <file_alias>.deck                    // stable id, one card per deck, e.g. P1.deck
title: <human deck title — from slide 1 / the filename>

source.as_of: <vintage, e.g. 'Sep 2025' — ALWAYS set; this dates every answer built on the deck>
source.captured_date: <optional: when the content was collected, if different from as_of>

summary: <the COLLECTIVE summary: 3-6 plain sentences on what the whole deck is, its purpose/narrative arc, and what it collectively covers. Derivable ONLY from the slides.>
use_cases: <a real question this deck is the right source for>
<another — cover 'what does the deck say about X', 'which slide covers Y', 'who/what is mentioned'>

slides.title: <slide heading, or null>
slides.point: <ONE sentence: what this slide contains / asserts. This is what lets a single slide be retrieved.>

entities.name: <canonical entity name (normalize company/person names via aliases.csv)>
entities.why: <short: why this entity appears in THIS deck / its role in the narrative>

not_answerable.q: <a plausible question this deck CANNOT answer>

warnings: <image-only deck | vintage_unknown | text truncated in slide N | ...>
